_note: Federal deductions for personal income tax — 2026 figures (CHF). Cantonal deductions vary.
_source: ESTV / AFC — rates art. 33-35 LIFD, indexed annually

pillar_3a._self_employed_note: 20 % of net self-employment income, capped at 36 288

professional_expenses._note: art. 26 LIFD — actual or flat rate, employee may choose

children._note: art. 35 LIFD — federal level; cantons add more

insurance_premiums._note: art. 33 al. 1 lit. g LIFD — health, accident, life insurance + interest on savings

donations._note: art. 33a LIFD — donations to public-utility entities

bvg_buyback._note: No federal cap; must be justified by gap in pension coverage (rachat lacune)
